user.title: Mälarenergi PowerHub
user.description: Sign in with BankID. Click Next to show the QR code.

bankid_qr.title: Scan QR code with BankID
bankid_qr.description: Open the BankID app and scan the QR code below. **Scan within 30 seconds** — the code rotates every second and expires after ~3 minutes. Click Submit to check if authentication is complete.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Mälarenergi. Check your internet connection.
error.bankid_failed: BankID login failed. Please try again.
error.no_facilities: No facilities found for this account.

create_invitation.name: Create invitation
create_invitation.description: Creates a sharing invitation for a facility.

facility_id.name: Facility ID
facility_id.description: The facility to share. Omit when only one facility is configured.

share_all_devices.name: Share all devices
share_all_devices.description: Whether to share all devices in the facility.

invitation_id.name: Invitation ID
invitation_id.description: The ID of the invitation to delete.
